task_completion.description: Read the extraction coordinates from the target text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output, text editor, or script showing the contents of ~/AstroImages/cluster_extraction/extraction_target.txt being read or displayed.

task_completion.description: Extract a 300x300 pixel subframe centered on the cluster core from the full M12 V-band FITS image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An image processing tool (e.g., AstroImageJ, DS9) or a script (e.g., Python with astropy) showing a 300x300 crop operation being performed on m12_vband.fits using the provided coordinates.

task_completion.description: Save the extracted subframe to the specified output path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal command (like ls), file manager, or script execution showing m12_core_subframe.fits successfully created in ~/AstroImages/cluster_extraction/output/.

task_completion.description: Calculate dimensions and statistics (mean, std dev, min, max) for both the full image and the subframe.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output, script execution, or GUI measurement tool displaying the calculated dimensions, mean, standard deviation, minimum, and maximum pixel values for both FITS images.
Calculator, script, or terminal output showing the division of the subframe mean by the full image mean to compute the core concentration ratio.

task_completion.description: Generate and save the final statistics report with all required information.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output (e.g., cat) showing the final extraction_report.txt in the output directory, containing dimensions, all 4 statistics for both images, the extraction coordinates, and the concentration ratio.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually processed the FITS file to create the subframe.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the use of genuine image processing tools or scripts (like Python/astropy or a FITS viewer) rather than just using 'touch' to create an empty file named m12_core_subframe.fits.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually computed the statistics and ratio.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for code execution, tool usage, or calculator inputs that derive the statistics and ratio, ensuring the agent did not just hallucinate or invent plausible-looking numbers for the report.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the exact specified output paths.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check terminal commands or file explorers to ensure the outputs are strictly placed in ~/AstroImages/cluster_extraction/output/ and not in the parent directory or elsewhere.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output FITS file must be saved exactly at /home/ga/AstroImages/cluster_extraction/output/m12_core_subframe.fits. The expected report must be saved exactly at /home/ga/AstroImages/cluster_extraction/output/extraction_report.txt. The extracted subframe must be exactly 300x300 pixels.
